additional_metadata.note: First Boston dbt Meetup, hosted online.

events.agenda: Inaugural Boston dbt Meetup covering designing informative data models at HubSpot and bridging finance and BI with dbt at Wistia.
events.event_description: The dbt community in Boston is growing; the first meetup features two speakers from Boston data teams currently implementing dbt.
events.raw_text:
Fri, May 8, 2020 · 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM CEST

Online event

The first Boston dbt Meetup (online)

Speaker Lineup:
Designing more informative data models with dbt - Ashley Sherwood, Senior Data Analyst, HubSpot (Data Stack: Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Looker). Building a new reporting table for HubSpot's partner program.

Bridging the "GAAP" between Finance and BI with dbt - Christopher Bertrand, Data Scientist, Wistia (Data Stack: Fivetran, Redshift, dbt, Mode). Wistia's first large-scale dbt project, modeling revenue.

talks.description: How HubSpot's partner program team identified a reporting gap and designed a new dbt data model to track solution reseller engagement for annual planning.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Designing more informative data models with dbt. Ashley Sherwood, Senior Data Analyst, HubSpot
talks.title: Designing more informative data models with dbt

talks.description: The history of Wistia's first large-scale dbt project modeling revenue, and improvements made over three years to increase usability and accuracy of financial data.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Bridging the "GAAP" between Finance and BI with dbt. Christopher Bertrand, Data Scientist, Wistia
talks.title: Bridging the "GAAP" between Finance and BI with dbt

events.agenda: Talks on evaluating marketplace dynamics with geospatial analytics at Drizly and building performant dbt data models at Simply Business.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are gatherings dedicated to helping you own your analytics engineering workflow, focusing on the impact of dbt in the data community.
events.raw_text:
Wed, May 26, 2021 · 6:00 PM to 7:15 PM CEST

Online event

Boston dbt Meetup online

Speaker Lineup:
Evaluating Marketplace Dynamics with Geospatial Analytics - Athena Casarotto, Associate BI Manager, Drizly & Jake Smart, Production DS Manager, Drizly. How Drizly built a geospatial engine using dbt, Mapbox, and Uber's h3, visualized in Looker.

Return of the Hypercube - Alex Hancock, Head of Customer Analytics, Simply Business. Building performant data models with dbt at Simply Business.

talks.description: How Drizly built a geospatial analytics engine using dbt, Mapbox, and Uber's h3 to transform aggregated market performance into hyperlocal, actionable insights visualized in Looker.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Evaluating Marketplace Dynamics with Geospatial Analytics. Athena Casarotto, Associate BI Manager, Drizly & Jake Smart, Production DS Manager, Drizly
talks.speaker_title: Associate BI Manager & Production DS Manager, Drizly
talks.title: Evaluating Marketplace Dynamics with Geospatial Analytics

talks.description: Simply Business's approach to building performant data models with dbt across a large multi-business-type customer base.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Return of the Hypercube. Alex Hancock, Head of Customer Analytics, Simply Business
talks.speaker_title: Head of Customer Analytics, Simply Business
talks.title: Return of the Hypercube

events.agenda: Trivia, a data observability demo from Metaplane, and an overview of dbt package hub package types.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are gatherings dedicated to helping you own your analytics engineering workflow.

events.raw_text:
Thu, Sep 30, 2021 · 6:00 PM to 7:30 PM EDT

Online event

Boston dbt Meetup - ONLINE September Edition

Agenda:
Trivia friendly competition - Gaston Mollica
Data observability for everyone: Metaplane demo - Kevin Hu
The five (and a half) types of packages you'll meet in the dbt package hub - Jason Ganz

talks.description: A live demo of Metaplane's data observability platform for monitoring data quality.

events.agenda: Casual in-person social gathering for the Boston dbt community, no formal presentations.
events.event_description: An event to bring Boston-based folks in the dbt community together for socializing.
events.raw_text:
Thu, May 5, 2022 · 6:30 PM to 9:00 PM EDT

Convene, Boston

Boston dbt Meetup (in-person)

We are excited to help bring Boston-based folks in the dbt Community together! Looking forward to socializing and seeing both new and familiar faces. Thank you Starburst Data for helping us spread the word in Boston.

events.agenda: Talks on empowering data mesh with dbt at Rapid7 and using dbt to optimize mobile SQL query composition at Zing Data.
events.event_description: Networking event for the data engineering community to hear end-user experiences with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jun 14, 2023 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM EDT

1 Lincoln St, Boston, MA

Boston dbt Meetup - Q2 Edition!

Presentations:
Empower Datamesh with dbt: Streamlining workflows and promoting cross-team collaboration - William Kuan, Senior Data Engineer, Rapid7
Using dbt to optimize queries from your phone - Sabin Thomas, Founder & CTO, Zing Data

talks.description: Using dbt in a decentralized data mesh approach to distribute data responsibility across teams, enabling agility, self-service, and simplified CI/CD.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Empower Datamesh with dbt: Streamlining workflows and promoting cross-team collaboration. William Kuan, Senior Data Engineer, Rapid7
talks.title: Empower Datamesh with dbt: Streamlining workflows and promoting cross-team collaboration

talks.description: Architecture patterns for mobile-first data interactivity tools, and using dbt to evaluate and evolve SQL query composition patterns for mobile constraints.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Using dbt to optimize queries from your phone. Sabin Thomas, Founder & CTO, Zing Data
talks.title: Using dbt to optimize queries from your phone

additional_metadata.note: Thanks given to Rapid7 for hosting.

Wed, Sep 27, 2023 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM EDT

Rapid7, Boston, MA

Boston dbt Meetup - Q3 Edition!

Presentations:
Capturing History in dbt - Daniel Allen, Lead Data Engineer, Rapid7. Dynamically capturing history on Snowflake tables through dbt models, for auditing changes and point-in-time snapshots.
Talk Title TBA - Jason Hall, Senior Solutions Architect, Upsolver

talks.description: How Rapid7 implemented dynamic history capture on Snowflake tables using dbt models, applicable to any model, for auditing changes and point-in-time snapshots.

talks.title: Capturing History in dbt
